# Building in Public: Why Transparency Wins

The build-in-public movement has shifted from a niche practice to a core growth strategy. Founders who share their journey openly attract early adopters who become advocates.

## Three Pillars

1. **Radical transparency** creates accountability through shared revenue numbers and roadmap decisions.
2. **Community feedback loops** shorten iteration cycles.
3. **Storytelling** compounds over time, turning process into a marketing asset.

## Practical Tactics

- Weekly changelog posts
- Public metrics dashboards
- Short video updates showing real product work
- Direct engagement with community questions

Consistency matters more than virality. Twelve months of steady updates beats a single viral post.
